## Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck bin/outpost install.sh shared/bootstrap-user.sh shared/sshd.sh` passes
- [ ] `bash tests/smoke.sh` passes (added/updated a case if behaviour changed)
- [ ] Docs updated under `docs/src/content/docs/` if behaviour changed
- [ ] Ran `pnpm changeset` and committed the changeset (for user-facing changes)
